title: Automation QA Engineer
responsibilities: create and maintain test cases; automate regression and smoke checks; document defects and collaborate with engineering teams
requirements_text: We are looking for a junior specialist with hands-on experience in testing, jira, sql, postman, selenium. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: MetricWave is hiring a junior automation qa engineer to support validating product quality through manual and automated testing.
raw_text: Vacancy V047: Automation QA Engineer at MetricWave. Location: Warsaw. Employment: hybrid. Required experience: 1.9 years. Required skills: testing, jira, sql, postman, selenium, cypress, api testing. Optional skills: ci/cd, bug reporting, test planning. Responsibilities: create and maintain test cases; automate regression and smoke checks; document defects and collaborate with engineering teams.
